package.name: motoman_pl80_support

description.p: ROS-Industrial support for the Motoman PL80 (and variants).
This package contains configuration data, 3D models and launch files for Motoman PL80 manipulators.

Joint limits and maximum joint velocities are based on the information found in MOTOMAN-PL80 INSTRUCTIONS (HW2480410), rev 1. All urdfs are based on the default motion and joint velocity limits, unless noted otherwise.

NOTE: the PL80 is a palletizing manipulator, where the 4th joint ('joint_4') is constrained to orient the flange normal to within +/-15 degrees with respect to the ground plane normal. Unfortunately, this limitation can't be modelled using URDF joint limits, and must therefore be handled by the motion planner or other process planning trajectories. Failure to take this constraint into account will cause the Yaskawa robot controller to abort trajectory execution and to raise alarms on the Teach Pendant.
Before using any of the configuration files and / or meshes included in this package, be sure to check they are correct for the particular robot model and configuration you intend to use them with.

package.author: Jimmy McElwain
package.maintainer: G.A. vd. Hoorn (TU Delft Robotics Institute)
